results.check_summary: Two alternating arithmetic streams exactly reproduce the prefix.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE: odd terms rise by 4; even terms fall by 2.

results.check_summary: Observed positive jumps occur at triangular transition indices and rise by 3; intervening deltas are -3.
results.rule_summary: PDELTA with triangularly scheduled positive jumps +5,+8,+11,+14,+17 and intervening -3 steps.

results.check_summary: Growing arithmetic blocks with decreasing steps replay the full prefix.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK: block lengths grow and negative block steps decrease by 4.

results.check_summary: A repeating three-phase affine cycle exactly reproduces the prefix.
Finite-difference continuation provides the strongest polynomial replay.
results.rule_summary: POLY continuation from the observed finite-difference table.

results.check_summary: Four phase-separated streams reproduce the observed values and increments.
Second differences decrease by 5 consistently across the prefix.
Three phase-separated streams provide the strongest available full-prefix fit.
Odd and even subsequences have arithmetic second-difference patterns.
Three position-modulo streams reproduce the visible prefix.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE with independently extrapolated three-phase streams.

results.check_summary: Every term equals twice the previous term minus 1.
Multiplier 2 with alternating phase biases reproduces the prefix.
